mainHtml:
Home/Solutions/3D to 2D Engineering Drawing

Generate Manufacturing Communication Drawings from 3D Models

Organize 3D models into communicable 2D engineering drawing materials to help confirm dimensions, hole positions, tolerances and manufacturing requirements.

Upload Model

Extract Manufacturing Drawings from Models

3D models express shape, but quotation, machining, quality inspection and supplier communication still need clear views, dimensions, tolerances and technical notes.

The page organizes model information into a drawing framework and reminds which dimensions, datums, materials or finishes need customer confirmation.

View OrganizationDimension AnnotationHole Position InformationTolerance Requirements

Recommended Preparation

  • 3D model file
  • Critical dimension requirements
  • Tolerance and finishing
  • Drawing frame or template preference

Engineering Drawing Output Focus

The output goal is for engineering, procurement and quality teams to confirm manufacturing scope around the same information.

Engineering ViewsOrganize front, section, detail and critical feature views.
Dimension AnnotationMark lengths, hole positions, thicknesses and assembly dimensions that affect quotation and manufacturing.
Manufacturing NotesAdd material, heat treatment, finish and inspection notes.

Typical Uses for Model-to-Drawing Conversion

Suitable when 3D exists but formal 2D drawings are missing, for old-part replication, supplier inquiry and first article inspection preparation.

01View OrganizationOrganize front, top, section, detail enlargement and key structure views to reduce communication misunderstanding.
02Critical DimensionsPrioritize dimensions that affect assembly, machining path, inspection and cost instead of filling every dimension mechanically.
03Manufacturing NotesAdd manufacturing information such as material, heat treatment, finish, chamfer, deburring and inspection requirements.

Organize 3D Models into 2D Engineering Drawings

Upload the model and add manufacturing requirements to generate a drawing framework first, then engineers confirm key annotations.

Convert Drawing
